    • getMachineElement

      protected Element getMachineElement(String bareName)
      Utility method to get an element representing a IMachineRoot created with createMachine(String)
      Parameters:
      bareName - not used
      Returns:
      an element.

    • getContextElement

      protected Element getContextElement(String bareName)
      Utility method to get an element representing a IContextRoot created with createContext(String)
      Parameters:
      bareName - not used
      Returns:
      an element.

    • addEventElement

      protected Element addEventElement(Element parent, String eventLabel)
      Utility method to get an element representing a IEvent created with createEvent(IMachineRoot, String);
      Parameters:
      parent - the parent of the new element. parent.getType() must return IMachineRoot.ELEMENT_TYPE
      eventLabel - the label of the new event.
      Returns:
      the newly created element.

    • addInvariant

      protected Element addInvariant(Element parent, String label, String predicate)

    • addVariant

      protected Element addVariant(Element parent, String label, String expression)

    • addAction

      protected Element addAction(Element parent, String label, String assignment)
      Created a new Element representing an IAction with the given label and assignment.

      The new Element is added to parent's children.

      Parameters:
      parent - An Element. Created element is added to parent's children. parent.getType() must return IEvent.ELEMENT_TYPE. Must not be null.
      label - A string. Value of EventBAttributes.LABEL_ATTRIBUTE. Must not be null.
      assignment - A string. Value of EventBAttributes.ASSIGNMENT_ATTRIBUTE. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      the created element

    • addAction

      protected void addAction(Element parent, String[] labels, String[] assignements)

    • addElementWithLabelPredicate

      protected Element addElementWithLabelPredicate(Element parent, IInternalElementType<?> type, String label, String predicate, boolean isTheorem)
      Created a new Element representing an IInternalElement of the given type.

      The created element has a label and a predicate, and is added to parent's children

      Parameters:
      parent - An Element. Created element is added to parent's children. Must not be null.
      type - An IInternalElementType. Must not be null.
      label - A string. Value of EventBAttributes.LABEL_ATTRIBUTE. Must not be null.
      predicate - A string. Value of EventBAttributes.PREDICATE_ATTRIBUTE. Must not be null.
      isTheorem - A boolean. Value of EventBAttributes.THEOREM_ATTRIBUTE. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      the created Element

    • addElementWithIdentifier

      protected Element addElementWithIdentifier(Element parent, IInternalElementType<?> type, String identifier)
      Created a new Element representing an IInternalElement of the given type. The created element has a identifier and is added to parent's children
      Parameters:
      parent - An Element. Created element is added to parent's children. Must not be null
      type - An IInternalElementType. Must not be null
      identifier - A string. Value of EventBAttributes.IDENTIFIER_ATTRIBUTE. Must not be null
      Returns:
      the created Element

    • addElementWithStringAttribute

      protected Element addElementWithStringAttribute(Element parent, IInternalElementType<?> type, IAttributeType.String attribute, String value)
      Created a new Element representing an IInternalElement of the given type. The created element has a string attribute and is added to parent's children
      Parameters:
      parent - An Element. Created element is added to parent's children. Must not be null
      type - An IInternalElementType. Must not be null
      attribute - a IAttributeType.String. Must not be null
      value - A string. Value of the given attribute. Must not be null
      Returns:
      the created Element

    • addElementWithIdentifier

      protected void addElementWithIdentifier(Element parent, IInternalElementType<?> type, String[] identifiers)
      Created new Elements representing IInternalElement of the given type. The created elements have an identifier and are added to parent's children
      Parameters:
      parent - An Element. Created elements are added to parent's children. Must not be null
      type - An IInternalElementType. Must not be null
      identifiers - An array of string. Value of EventBAttributes.IDENTIFIER_ATTRIBUTE. Must not be null

    • addElementWithLabelPredicate

      protected void addElementWithLabelPredicate(Element parent, IInternalElementType<?> type, String[] labels, String[] predicates, boolean[] isTheorem)
      Created new Elements representing IInternalElement of the given type. Created elements have a label and a predicate, and are added to parent's children
      Parameters:
      parent - An Element. Created elements are added to parent's children. Must not be null
      type - An IInternalElementType. Must not be null
      labels - An array of String. Value of EventBAttributes.LABEL_ATTRIBUTE. Must have the same length as predicates and must not be null
      predicates - An array of String. Value of EventBAttributes.PREDICATE_ATTRIBUTE. Must have the same length as labels and must not be null
      isTheorem - An array of booleans. Value of EventBAttributes.THEOREM_ATTRIBUTE. Must have the same length as labels and must not be null

    • assertEquivalent

      protected void assertEquivalent(String msg, IInternalElement root, Element expected) throws RodinDBException
      ensures that element is equivalent to root. An Element and a IInternalElement is equivalent if they have the same type, the same attributes and all children are equivalents.
      Parameters:
      msg - message to print if an error occurs
      root - an IInternalElement
      expected - an Element representing the expected value
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • assertNotEquivalent

      protected void assertNotEquivalent(String msg, IInternalElement root, Element element) throws RodinDBException
      ensures that element is not equivalent to root. An Element and a IInternalElement is equivalent if they have the same type, the same attributes and all children are equivalents.
      Parameters:
      msg - message to print if an error occurs
      root - an IInternalElement
      element - an Element is a tree that represents an IInternalElement
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • verifyOperation

      protected void verifyOperation(AtomicOperation op, IInternalElement root, Element element) throws RodinDBException, org.eclipse.core.commands.ExecutionException
      Throws:
      RodinDBException
      org.eclipse.core.commands.ExecutionException
